name: Aplikasi Segel Dada Occlusive
description: Nyegel tatu dada sing nyedhot (pneumothorax mbukak) kanthi segel dada sing dibuwang kanggo nyegah mlebu udara nalika ngidini ngeculake tekanan.
steps: Mbukak tatu - potong utawa copot sandhangan.
Ngilangke kulit sak tatu minangka garing sabisa (getih, kringet nyegah adhesion).
Selehake segel ing tatu, tengah ing bolongan. Pencet kanthi kuat, priksa manawa kabeh pinggiran nempel.
Priksa orientasi katup - ventilasi kudu madhep metu (adoh saka kulit) lan tetep ora ana alangan.
Kaji maneh swara napas. Yen rusak terus sawise sealing, nimbang tension pneumothorax -- nindakake NCD.
Yen segel vented ora kasedhiya, segel non-vented bisa digunakake nanging kudu dipantau kanggo pangembangan tension pneumothorax.
warnings: Segel non-vented bisa ngowahi pneumothorax prasaja dadi pneumothorax tension - nggunakake segel vented mung ing lapangan.
Taping telung sisi (segel improvisasi) ora dianjurake maneh dening CoTCCC - gunakake segel dada vented komersial.
Tansah masang segel kanggo ENTRANCE lan EXIT wounds.
